[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010000 2
1 0010010 2
2 1001011 4
3 1100100 3
4 0100100 2
5 1111001 5
6 0101110 4
7 1010101 4

01 0000010 1
12 1000000 1
23 0111111 6
34 0000000 a
45 0010000 1
56 1100100 3 match 3
67 0000000 a
70 1011001 4

02 0000000 a
13 0010101 3
24 0001001 2
35 0000000 a
46 1100100 3 match 3

71 0001010 2

05 0000000 a
